attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.RELATIONSHIP_ID,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_CODE,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.OBJECT_ID,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.SUBJECT_ID, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.POSITION_REFERENCE, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ACTIVE_START_DATE, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ACTIVE_END_DATE, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.DISPLAY_ORDER, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.MANDATORY_FLAG ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.CONTEXT, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE1, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE2 ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE3 ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE4, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE5, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE6 ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE7,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE8 ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE9 ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE10 ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE11 ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE12, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE13, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE14, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.ATTRIBUTE15 ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.CREATED_BY ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.CREATION_DATE, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.SECURITY_GROUP_ID ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.MIGRATED_FLAG ,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.REFRESH_DATETIME
From
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS
(
SELECT RELATIONSHIP_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from 
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS
minus
SELECT RELATIONSHIP_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from
$$NRTACCUMDB.STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS
) ACM
Where
ACM.RELATIONSHIP_ID=STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.RELATIONSHIP_ID and
ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_CSI_II_RELATIONSHIPS.REFRESH_DATETIME
